split.rule: First quarantine every previously opened test assignment; for every remaining pair assign bucket from first 64 bits of SHA-256(final salt + NUL + normalized English + NUL + normalized Russian) modulo 100
split.quarantineRule: Any test assignment opened during feature development can never re-enter training, validation or a later final test

exampleGeneration.ambiguousGoldPolicy: Exclude literal-punctuation examples when the identical observation yields another punctuation-only target around the same core; also exclude no-context observations with multiple distinct known target cores
exampleGeneration.storedData: feature vectors, risks, labels and aggregate baseline outcomes; no sentence or token text

ranker.type: shared 8-unit tanh candidate scorer with a linear residual
ranker.linearAblation: Rejected on validation because punctuation-short errors and correct paths were not linearly separable at the required safety bound
ranker.subwordFeatures: signed hashed character 2-5-grams, 32 buckets per candidate language
ranker.contextFeatures: signed hashed candidate-conditioned bigrams and trigrams over the last two completed tokens, 32 buckets per candidate language
ranker.optimizer: deterministic mini-batch Adam in NumPy 2.3.5 with single-threaded BLAS
ranker.calibration: validation-only temperature search plus per-risk winner-margin thresholds selected jointly by dynamic programming under global Wilson-95 false-positive and wrong-replacement budgets; both-known risks require zero validation errors

regressionOnly.name: User mixed-layout stress corpus
regressionOnly.rule: Never use for fitting, model weights, calibration, or threshold tuning. It may be used only for development regression and runtime-composition arbitration; no token-specific rule may be derived from it
